summary: Smoke tested Arabic RTL trivia 'الأرض' backend (7 endpoints via curl) and frontend (home + create room + player join). Backend fully working: 20 categories, room create/join/spectate, full duel flow (attack, solo-duel question served without answer key, eye/time/skip/shield power-ups reduce counts, answer resolves duel, last_action set with correct_idx, pending_action duel_review, next_turn cycles to P2). Validation correct: non-adjacent attack rejected ('يجب أن تكون الخانة مجاورة'), non-current-player attack rejected ('ليس دورك'), starting with <2 players rejected implicitly, 3rd-win powerup grant logic present. Frontend home renders title 'الأرض' and 3 buttons; host creates room and 6-digit PIN visible; second browser tab joins with sports category and Player1 appears in host lobby with correct icon.
passed: POST /rooms/start places players on grid and sets state=active
GET /rooms/{code}/state hides answer key ('a') during active duel, exposes correct_idx in last_action after resolve
can_attack: non-adjacent rejected, adjacent free cell allowed
Powerups eye/time/skip/shield all succeed and decrement counts
Answer resolves duel, sets pending_action duel_review
Frontend home: title + btn-host + btn-join + btn-spectate render
Host create-room flow shows 6-digit PIN via [data-testid=host-pin]
Player join flow: PIN + name + category-select + submit -> lobby
Host lobby auto-refreshes and shows joined Player1
notes: Duel timeout (12s) auto-resolve, game-end winner declaration, and winner-screen were NOT exercised end-to-end due to time. Logic reviewed in server.py appears correct (resolve_duel_if_ready handles timed_out, next_turn sets state=finished when alive<=1). Recommend full agent verify these edge cases plus DuelModal timer UI and leaderboard sorting.
